mapper.select: select id, word, keyword_type as keywordType, create_time as createTime from sensitive_word order by keyword_type asc, id asc
select id, word, keyword_type as keywordType, create_time as createTime from sensitive_word where keyword_type = #{keywordType} order by id asc
mapper.insert: insert into sensitive_word (word, keyword_type, create_time) values (#{word}, #{keywordType}, #{createTime})

insert into sensitive_word (word, keyword_type, create_time) values
(#{item.word}, #{item.keywordType}, #{item.createTime})
mapper.select: select id, word, keyword_type as keywordType, create_time as createTime from sensitive_word order by id desc limit #{param1}, #{param2}

select count(*) from sensitive_word
and keyword_type = #{keywordType}
select id, word, keyword_type as keywordType, create_time as createTime from sensitive_word where word like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') order by id desc limit #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(*) from sensitive_word where word like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
select id, word, keyword_type as keywordType, create_time as createTime from sensitive_word where keyword_type in (2, 3) order by id desc limit #{start}, #{pageSize}
select count(*) from sensitive_word where keyword_type in (2, 3)

select id, word, keyword_type as keywordType, create_time as createTime from sensitive_word where keyword_type in (2, 3) and word like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') order by id desc limit #{start}, #{pageSize}
select count(*) from sensitive_word where keyword_type in (2, 3) and word like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
